current_comment: Year-month-day partition value (YYYYMMDD as INT) injected by the gold/spaceship pipeline. Equals YEAR(etr_ts)*10000 + MONTH(etr_ts)*100 + DAY(etr_ts). Used as Delta partition key for day-level pruning in UC. (Pipeline-injected metadata; not present in Synapse source DDL.)
best_sibling_cell: ETL partition key — year-month-day component derived from Occurred (e.g., "2019-06-11"). Used by Generic Pipeline for data lake partitioning. Populated for historical data; empty/NULL for rows from ~2025 onwards. (Tier 3 — WalletDB.Wallet.WalletAssets)

current_comment: Unique identifier for the execution
best_sibling_cell: EMS execution identifier. Links to CopyFromLake.eToroLogs_Real_Hedge_EMSOrders.ExecutionID. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)
How execution was performed after preparation (internal routing to provider/billing). (Tier 4 — Confluence, Cashout (CO) Processing)

1 if the investor has at least one currently open copy position with this SP (MIN(CloseDateID)=0); 0 if all positions are closed. Open/closed sentinel: CloseDateID=0 = open mirror in Dim_Mirror. (Tier 2 — SP_Capital_Guarantee_Panel)

current_comment: Rejection reason provided by the LP if the order was rejected.
best_sibling_cell: Standardized rejection reason from Dictionary.DocumentRejectReason. Prefix 'POA -' = Proof of Address, 'POI -' = Proof of Identity. Top value: 'POA - Proof of address cannot be accepted' (27.7%).

current_comment: The client execution rate given by the TOB
The timestamp at which the LP sent the execution back to us
The rate of the SL/TP trigger
The timestamp at which we executed the client's order from our internal TOB
Unique identifier for the position
best_sibling_cell: Position identifier. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position. HASH distribution key. DWH note: for ActionTypeID=36 + CompensationReasonID IN (117,118), extracted from Description field via reverse string parsing with TRY_CAST fallback. COALESCE prefers Dim_Position. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl) (via BI_DB_Fact_Customer_Action_Position_Distribution)

current_comment: Identifier for the financial instrument used in the position
best_sibling_cell: Composite instrument identifier. CASE WHEN eToroInstrumentID >= 100000 THEN eToroInstrumentID ELSE CryptoId END. For eToro-mapped instruments, equals eToroInstrumentID; for crypto-native instruments, equals CryptoID. Not a direct FK to EXW_Currency.Instruments. (Tier 2 — EXW_Wallet.CryptoTypes / EXW_Wallet.CryptoMarketRatesMappings)
Display name from Dim_Instrument.InstrumentDisplayName in #joined. (Tier 2 -SP_Finance_Non_US_Settlement_Report, Dim_Instrument.InstrumentDisplayName)

current_comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.
best_sibling_cell: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. COALESCE(POB.RealCID, TIN.RealCID). From Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)

Asset class classification. StocksETF (IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID IN (5,6)), Real Crypto (IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID=10), CFD (IsSettled=0), Other Asset. Part of the table grain. (Tier 2 — SP_W_Compliance_Vulnerability_Detection)

current_comment: The commision of opening the position. The sum of the eToro s commision to the customer and the provider s commision to eToro. (AskSpreaded - BidSpreaded) * units * ConversionRate.
best_sibling_cell: Commission amount. Opens: SUM(FullCommissionOnOpenInit) — accumulated FullCommissionByUnits including partial close children. Closes: SUM(FullCommissionOnClose) for same-day opens, SUM(FullCommissionOnClose - FullCommissionByUnits) for older positions. (Tier 2 — SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)
Unit count after this change. DWH note: for ChangeTypeID=13, backfilled from UnitsOpenStartOfDay when NULL. (Tier 2 — Dim_PositionChangeLog)

current_comment: Leverage of the open position
best_sibling_cell: Leverage multiplier. For regular positions: from Dim_Position.Leverage (1, 5, 10, 20, 30, 50, 100, 200, 400). For copy positions: hardcoded 0 (copy relationships have no instrument leverage). Determines margin and settlement type. Distribution: 1x=44.8%, 20x=23.5%, 10x=10.4%, 5x=10.3%, 30x=4.5%, 2x=3.3%, others <2%. (Tier 1 — Dim_Position wiki, Trade.PositionTbl)
Deposit amount converted to USD. Computed as Amount * ExchangeRate. Standard financial reporting currency. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_Deposit_State)

current_comment: The server through which the position got hedged
best_sibling_cell: Hedge server that executed the trade. From Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot (fallback: Dim_Position.HedgeServerID). (Tier 2 -SP_VarCommission, ISNULL(Snapshot.HedgeServerID, Dim_Position.HedgeServerID))

Settlement type classification: 'Real' = settled stock ownership position (IsSettled=1 or HedgeServerID IN (9,102,112,125,126) for LP side), 'CFD' = contract-for-difference. Client-side uses Dim_PositionChangeLog correction (ChangeTypeID=13) to recover the IsSettled value AS OF the report date before any subsequent changes. (Tier 2 -SP_HedgeCost)

The rate at which the LP actually executed the hedge order, from Dealing_staging.Etoro_Hedge_ExecutionLog.ExecutionRate. This is the price eToro received from the provider. (Tier 2 — SP_Execution_Slippage)
FK to Trade.Orders. Originating order. NULL for corporate action/dividend positions. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)

current_comment: ActionType from History.Position
best_sibling_cell: Primary key. DWH rename of production ID. Values 0-26. 0=Customer (manual), 1=Stop Loss, 2=End of Week, 3=SL via trade server, 4=Return to Market, 5=Take Profit, 6=TP via trade server, 7=Contact Rollover, 8=BackOffice, 9=Hierarchical Close, 10=Hierarchical close by recovery, 11=Join Demo Challenge, 12=Close All, 13=Copy Stop Loss, 14=Mirror manual, 15=Manual Liquidation, 16=BSL, 17=Manual Unregister, 18=BackOffice Unregister, 19=Redeem, 20=Operational adjustment, 21=Orphaned, 22=Transferred Out,

current_comment: Regulatory entity/jurisdiction (e.g., CySEC, FCA, ASIC, SEC). Determines which eToro legal entity the customer belongs to.
best_sibling_cell: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. 12 distinct values: CySEC, FCA, FSA Seychelles, ASIC & GAML, FSRA, FinCEN+FINRA, BVI, ASIC, FinCEN, eToroUS, None, NFA. Resolved via JOIN Dim_Regulation dr1 ON fsc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID; SELECT dr1.Name. (Tier 1 -Dictionary.Regulation)

current_comment: Customer registered country name or ISO code.
best_sibling_cell: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.Country.Name via DWH_dbo.Dim_Country JOIN on CountryID. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Country)

Customer player-level tier. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_PlayerLevel. Per dictionary (verified 2026-05-13): 0=N/A, 1=Bronze, 2=Platinum, 3=Gold, 4=Internal (in-house / eToro-employee accounts), 5=Silver, 6=Platinum Plus, 7=Diamond. NOT a Popular Investor signal (PI is tracked by GuruStatusID). NOT a demo flag (demo is AccountTypeID=2). Default=0. (Tier 2 - DWH_dbo.Dim_PlayerLevel)

current_comment: The ID of the Change action type
best_sibling_cell: Position change type code. 1=open, 6=close, 11=parent split, 12=child split. (Tier 2 — SP_Finance_Real_Futures_Custody_And_Transfers, Prep_Data.ChangeTypeID)

current_comment: Whether TCL (Trailing Stop Loss) enabled for the position or not

best_sibling_cell: The rate shown in the eToro UI at the time of the request. From EMSOrders. Used as CustomerChosenRate for Manual Open/Close. (Tier 2 — SP_Slippage_Report)

Integer identifier of the liquidity provider account used for hedging. References External_etoro_Hedge_HedgeServerToLiquidityAccount.LiquidityAccountID. NULL for 25% of rows (positions without assigned LP). 44 distinct accounts observed. (Tier 3 — External_etoro_Hedge_HedgeServerToLiquidityAccount DDL + live data)
Timestamp reported by the external price provider. May differ from Occurred due to network latency. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Trade.CurrencyPrice)
International Securities Identification Number. ISNULL(eToro_side, IG_side) -- prefers Dealing_Duco_EODRecon.ISINCode, falls back to LP_IG_PS_EODPositions.ISIN. (Tier 2 -SP_IGRecon)
Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number. From Dim_Instrument.CUSIP. Standard US security identifier for 1099-B reporting. (Tier 2 — SP_Tax_1099_PartB, Dim_Instrument.CUSIP)

current_comment: Stock exchange name (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments.
best_sibling_cell: Exchange name, e.g. "Nasdaq", "NYSE", "Sydney", "Borsa Italiana". From Dim_Instrument.Exchange. Drives settlement-date logic (T+1 for NYSE/Nasdaq/TSX, T+2 for others). (Tier 2 -SP_Finance_Non_US_Settlement_2025, Dim_Instrument.Exchange)

current_comment: The sell-side (denomination) currency. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Currency(CurrencyID). For forex: the quote currency (e.g., USD in EUR/USD). For stocks: the trading denomination currency (USD, EUR, GBX). Only 67 distinct values since many assets share the same denomination. (Tier 1 -- upstream wiki, Trade.Instrument)
best_sibling_cell: The sell-side (denomination) currency. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Currency(CurrencyID). For forex: the quote currency (e.g., USD in EUR/USD). For stocks: the trading denomination currency (USD, EUR, GBX). (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument wiki, Trade.Instrument)
Numeric platform error code. Join to Dealing_Fails_PI_ErrorCodes for symbolic name. (Tier 2 — Trade.PositionFail passthrough)

ETL-computed USD conversion rate for this position direction. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 → 1.0; if BuyCurrencyID=1 → 1/Bid(IsBuy=1) or 1/Ask(IsBuy=0); if cross-rate via bridge instrument with Conversion_SellCurrencyID=1 → Conversion_Bid or Conversion_Ask; else → 1/Conversion_Bid-or-Ask. NULL where no price could be resolved. Multiply Bid × ConversionRate to get USD value per unit. (Tier 2 — SP_CashRiskMatrix)

Twitter Ads account display name. Latest version resolved from account_history via ROW_NUMBER PARTITION BY id ORDER BY updated_at DESC. Empty string for AW-only rows. (Tier 2 — SP_Twitter, External_Fivetran_twitter_ads_account_history)

Percentage slippage relative to eToro's price: (IsBuy=1 ? 1 : -1) × (ExecutionRate − eToro_Price) / eToro_Price. Useful for comparing slippage across instruments of different price scales. (Tier 2 — SP_Execution_Slippage)

Event datetime. For KPI='FTDs': FTD timestamp (Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate — the deposit approval datetime). For KPI='Registration': registration datetime (Customer.CustomerStatic.Registered). Historical rows carry the original event timestamp from BI_DB_LiveAcquisitionDashboard_Daily. (Tier 2 — etoro.Customer.Customer.Registered / etoro.Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate)

current_comment: Same as Name: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.Regulation). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_regulation, rename chain: Name -> Regulation)
best_sibling_cell: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. 12 distinct values: CySEC, FCA, FSA Seychelles, ASIC & GAML, FSRA, FinCEN+FINRA, BVI, ASIC, FinCEN, eToroUS, None, NFA. Resolved via JOIN Dim_Regulation dr1 ON fsc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID; SELECT dr1.Name. (Tier 1 -Dictionary.Regulation)

current_comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.
best_sibling_cell: Position identifier. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position. HASH distribution key. DWH note: for ActionTypeID=36 + CompensationReasonID IN (117,118), extracted from Description field via reverse string parsing with TRY_CAST fallback. COALESCE prefers Dim_Position. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl) (via BI_DB_Fact_Customer_Action_Position_Distribution)

current_comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.
best_sibling_cell: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. COALESCE(POB.RealCID, TIN.RealCID). From Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)

current_comment: Global Customer ID — cross-regulation unique identifier for a customer across all eToro entities.
best_sibling_cell: Global Customer ID of the wallet owner. For customer wallets (type 5), this is the real user. For system wallets (types 1-4, 6-7), this is a service account. Gcid=0 conventionally indicates omnibus/system wallets. From Wallet.Wallets.Gcid. DWH note: WHERE GCID>0 filter in SP excludes unoccupied pool wallets and omnibus wallets — all GCIDs in this table belong to real customers. (Tier 1 — WalletDB.Wallet.CustomerWalletsView)

current_comment: Instrument identifier. Foreign key to Dim_Instrument.
best_sibling_cell: Composite instrument identifier. CASE WHEN eToroInstrumentID >= 100000 THEN eToroInstrumentID ELSE CryptoId END. For eToro-mapped instruments, equals eToroInstrumentID; for crypto-native instruments, equals CryptoID. Not a direct FK to EXW_Currency.Instruments. (Tier 2 — EXW_Wallet.CryptoTypes / EXW_Wallet.CryptoMarketRatesMappings)

current_comment: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)
best_sibling_cell: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. Passthrough from DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument.InstrumentDisplayName. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

current_comment: Instrument type category: 1=Currencies (forex), 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies. Note TypeIDs 3, 7, 8, 9 are unused gaps. Distribution: Stocks 82%, ETF 8%, Crypto 4%, Commodities 3%, Indices 2%, Currencies 1%. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)
best_sibling_cell: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. ISNULL(...,-1) masks NULL account-level feeds. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

current_comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)
best_sibling_cell: Asset class or copy-trade category. For regular positions: Dim_Instrument.InstrumentType text label (8 InstrumentTypeID-driven values: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies). For copy positions: 'Copy Trade' (MirrorTypeID≠4) or 'Copy Portfolio' (MirrorTypeID=4). Distribution: Stocks 36.8%, Indices 18.8%, Commodities 17.1%, Crypto Currencies 16.2%, Currencies 6.1%, ETF 4.0%, Copy Trade 0.8%, Copy Portfolio 0.2%. (Tier 2 — SP_PositionHoldingTime + Dim_Instru

current_comment: Hedge server identifier. Indicates which internal liquidity/execution server handled the trade.
best_sibling_cell: Hedge server that executed the trade. From Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot (fallback: Dim_Position.HedgeServerID). (Tier 2 -SP_VarCommission, ISNULL(Snapshot.HedgeServerID, Dim_Position.HedgeServerID))

1 Long 0 Short; NULL ⇒ non-trade row sentinel — widened/truncated via ISNULL(...,-1) with dividend amount-based overrides (Metric='Dividends') and CryptoToFiatFee sentinel -1 path. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)

current_comment: How many units of an instrument are in the position.
best_sibling_cell: Trade size in instrument units, split-adjusted. Dim_Position.AmountInUnitsDecimal * COALESCE(SplitRatio.AmountRatio, 1). (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position, split-adjusted)
Position open or close forex rate, split-adjusted. InitForexRate * COALESCE(SplitRatio.PriceRatio, 1). (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position, split-adjusted)

When the transaction record was created in the database. From SentTransactions.Occurred or ReceivedTransactions.Occurred. DWH note: Stored as datetime (datetime2 in source view). (Tier 1 — Wallet.TransactionsView)
EMS execution identifier. Links to CopyFromLake.eToroLogs_Real_Hedge_EMSOrders.ExecutionID. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)

current_comment: The reason for closing the position.
best_sibling_cell: Type of financial action from DWH_dbo.Dim_ActionType.Name. Only Deposit (ActionTypeID=7) and Cashout (ActionTypeID=8) are included. (Tier 2 — SP_eMoney_Daily_MIMO via Dim_ActionType)

1 if the investor has at least one currently open copy position with this SP (MIN(CloseDateID)=0); 0 if all positions are closed. Open/closed sentinel: CloseDateID=0 = open mirror in Dim_Mirror. (Tier 2 — SP_Capital_Guarantee_Panel)

current_comment: The exact date and time when the customer clicked to request opening a position.
best_sibling_cell: Timestamp when the client's request arrived at the eToro server. RequestOpenOccurred for opens, RequestCloseOccurred for closes. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)

LP routing method: HBC (Hedge By Client — client-side hedging) or CBH (Covered By Hedge — eToro hedges on LP side). Derived from CopyFromLake.eToroLogs_Real_Hedge_EMSOrders.HedgeExecutionModeID: 1=HBC, else=CBH. NULL when EMS record not found for a position. (Tier 2 — SP_Latency_Report)
The datetime at which the LP confirmed execution of the hedge order, per Dealing_staging.Etoro_Hedge_ExecutionLog. This is the actual fill timestamp. (Tier 2 — SP_Execution_Slippage)
Timestamp when the conversion was initiated. Passthrough from Wallet.Conversions.Occurred. (Tier 1 — WalletDB.Wallet.Conversions)

Settlement type classification: 'Real' = settled stock ownership position (IsSettled=1 or HedgeServerID IN (9,102,112,125,126) for LP side), 'CFD' = contract-for-difference. Client-side uses Dim_PositionChangeLog correction (ChangeTypeID=13) to recover the IsSettled value AS OF the report date before any subsequent changes. (Tier 2 -SP_HedgeCost)
P&L calculation version identifier. Indicates which pricing methodology was applied. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)
FK to Trade.Orders. Originating order. NULL for corporate action/dividend positions. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)
Timestamp when the EMS order status changed to "Routed" (LP acknowledged but not yet filled). Added SR-274939 Oct 2024. (Tier 2 — CopyFromLake.eToroLogs_Real_Hedge_EMSOrders)

current_comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate). Pro-rated for partial close — parents and children each show volume pro-rated to their own AmountInUnitsDecimal.
best_sibling_cell: USD trade volume. For opens: SUM(CAST(VolumeOpened AS BIGINT)) where VolumeOpened = SUM(Dim_Position.Volume) over OriginalPositionID partition. For closes: SUM(VolumeClosed) where VolumeClosed = VolumeOnClose. (Tier 2 — SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

ETL-computed USD conversion rate for this position direction. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 → 1.0; if BuyCurrencyID=1 → 1/Bid(IsBuy=1) or 1/Ask(IsBuy=0); if cross-rate via bridge instrument with Conversion_SellCurrencyID=1 → Conversion_Bid or Conversion_Ask; else → 1/Conversion_Bid-or-Ask. NULL where no price could be resolved. Multiply Bid × ConversionRate to get USD value per unit. (Tier 2 — SP_CashRiskMatrix)
Milliseconds from RequestOccurred to Occurred — time for the eToro database to record the trade. (Tier 2 — computed)
Milliseconds from RequestOccurred to ExecutionTime — total client-to-LP execution time. The primary latency KPI. Floored at 0. (Tier 2 — computed: DATEDIFF(ms, RequestCloseOccurred, ExecutionTime))
Milliseconds from RequestTimeFromEMS (EMS request timestamp) to ExecutionTime — time within the LP matching engine. Floored at 0. (Tier 2 — computed: DATEDIFF(ms, RequestTime, ExecutionTime))
Milliseconds from RequestOccurred to RoutedTime. Indicates time to LP acknowledgment. Floored at 0. Added SR-274939 Oct 2024. (Tier 2 — computed)

Flag: 1 if the position's RequestOccurred (close) or RequestOpenOccurred (open) falls within the first 5 minutes of the exchange session (from OpenTimeUTC in CalendarDB schedule). Used to isolate open-session latency spikes. Added SR-273548 Sep 2024. (Tier 2 — SP_Latency_Report)
1 if trade occurred within 7 minutes of market open. Compensation modifier. (Tier 2 — computed)
Spread proxy: TotalVolume × 0.01 (1% of total turnover). Stored as a reference metric to approximate spread revenue. Not used in rebate calculation. (Tier 2 - SP_M_CryptoRebateDiamond)
Timestamp when the market feed received this tick from the exchange (latency vs Occurred / ReceivedOnPriceServer). (Tier 4 — Confluence, Rates / prices (Buy, Sell, Bid, Ask))

Integer identifier of the liquidity provider account used for hedging. References External_etoro_Hedge_HedgeServerToLiquidityAccount.LiquidityAccountID. NULL for 25% of rows (positions without assigned LP). 44 distinct accounts observed. (Tier 3 — External_etoro_Hedge_HedgeServerToLiquidityAccount DDL + live data)

Raw bid price before spread adjustment. Mid-price reference. Compare to BidSpreaded to derive the spread. (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit.Bid via SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Synapse). NULL for ~208 rows/day where no price record exists.

Latest ask (offer) price from the most recent hourly candle yesterday. The price at which sellers are willing to sell. From Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted.AskLast. (Tier 2 — SP_Instruments_BidAndAsk, from Dim_GetSpreadedPriceCandle60MinSplitted)

current_comment: Same as PriceRatio: Cumulative price adjustment multiplier for this period. Multiply a historical price by this value to get its split-adjusted equivalent. 1.0 means no adjustment. Example: PriceRatio=0.25 means a 4:1 stock split occurred (1 old share = 4 new shares, price adjusted down to 25%). (Tier 3 -- live data, PriceLog.History.SplitRatio). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_historysplitratio, rename chain: PriceRatio -> History_Price_Rate)

best_sibling_cell: Sum of USD slippage across all trades in the (Date, InstrumentType, HedgingMode) bucket. Formula: SUM((IsBuy=1?1:-1)×(eToro_Price−ExecutionRate)×Units×FX_Rate). Positive = eToro gains; negative = eToro cost. (Tier 2 — SP_Execution_Slippage)

current_comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).
best_sibling_cell: Timestamp when this crypto asset was first added to the wallet (maps to WalletDB.Wallet.WalletAssets.Occurred). Despite the name, this is a wallet creation/association timestamp — not the ETL run time. CAST from datetime2(7) to datetime. (Tier 2 — SP_EXW_InternalWallet; renamed from Occurred)

Distributed Ledger Technology user flag from BI_DB_Client_Balance_CID_Level_New. MAX(IsDLTUser) per CID at report date. 1 = customer holds real crypto in DLT/blockchain custody (Fact_SnapshotCustomer.DltStatusID=4); 0 = standard crypto position. DLT users appear or disappear from balance aggregations when their DLT status changes. Added 2024-07-30. (Tier 2 — SP_IFRS_15_Balance)
The rate shown in the eToro UI at the time of the request. From EMSOrders. Used as CustomerChosenRate for Manual Open/Close. (Tier 2 — SP_Slippage_Report)

Customer player-level tier. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_PlayerLevel. Per dictionary (verified 2026-05-13): 0=N/A, 1=Bronze, 2=Platinum, 3=Gold, 4=Internal (in-house / eToro-employee accounts), 5=Silver, 6=Platinum Plus, 7=Diamond. NOT a Popular Investor signal (PI is tracked by GuruStatusID). NOT a demo flag (demo is AccountTypeID=2). Default=0. (Tier 2 - DWH_dbo.Dim_PlayerLevel)
Stop-loss rate; rewound to PreviousStopRate when edited after @dt. (Tier 2 -SP_PositionPnL, DWH_dbo.Dim_Position.StopRate / PositionChangeLog)

current_comment: The Limit Rate after the change
best_sibling_cell: Take-profit rate set at open (or most recent update). (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)

Event datetime. For KPI='FTDs': FTD timestamp (Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate — the deposit approval datetime). For KPI='Registration': registration datetime (Customer.CustomerStatic.Registered). Historical rows carry the original event timestamp from BI_DB_LiveAcquisitionDashboard_Daily. (Tier 2 — etoro.Customer.Customer.Registered / etoro.Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate)

current_comment: Same as RealCID: Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References Dim_Customer.RealCID. Each customer has one real CID. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_fact_customeraction, rename chain: RealCID -> CID)
best_sibling_cell: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. COALESCE(POB.RealCID, TIN.RealCID). From Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)

current_comment: Hedge server routing/executing hedges for this position. References Trade.HedgeServer.HedgeServerID.
best_sibling_cell: Hedge server that executed the trade. From Dim_PositionHedgeServerChangeLog_Snapshot (fallback: Dim_Position.HedgeServerID). (Tier 2 -SP_VarCommission, ISNULL(Snapshot.HedgeServerID, Dim_Position.HedgeServerID))

Asset class classification. StocksETF (IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID IN (5,6)), Real Crypto (IsSettled=1, InstrumentTypeID=10), CFD (IsSettled=0), Other Asset. Part of the table grain. (Tier 2 — SP_W_Compliance_Vulnerability_Detection)

current_comment: Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.

For eToro-mapped instruments, equals eToroInstrumentID; for crypto-native instruments, equals CryptoID. Not a direct FK to EXW_Currency.Instruments. current_comment: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)
best_sibling_cell: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. current_comment: Computed display name for UI, combining TDCUR_BUY.Abbreviation and TDCUR_SEL.Abbreviation.
best_sibling_cell: Internal instrument name with exchange suffix, e.g. "PHAR/USD", "FOX.RTH/USD", "MLX.ASX/AUD". From Dim_Instrument.Name. (Tier 2 -SP_Finance_Non_US_Settlement_2025, Dim_Instrument.Name)

current_comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)
best_sibling_cell: Instrument name from Dim_Instrument.Name (aliased as Symbol in SP). For stocks: ticker notation (e.g., AAPL). For some instruments, differs from the standard Symbol field. (Tier 2 — SP_Stocks_HS125, DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument.Name)

current_comment: Text abbreviation of SellCurrencyID -- denormalized from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation. Example: USD, EUR, GBX (GBP pence). DWH-added for query convenience. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)
best_sibling_cell: Trading symbol / ticker for the sell-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "GBX". UNIQUE constraint in production. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via sell-side join. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Currency) (via Dim_Instrument)

current_comment: Stock exchange name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)
best_sibling_cell: Exchange name, e.g. "Nasdaq", "NYSE", "Sydney", "Borsa Italiana". From Dim_Instrument.Exchange. Drives settlement-date logic (T+1 for NYSE/Nasdaq/TSX, T+2 for others). (Tier 2 -SP_Finance_Non_US_Settlement_2025, Dim_Instrument.Exchange)

current_comment: Same as Name: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.Regulation). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_regulation, rename chain: Name -> Regulation)
best_sibling_cell: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. 12 distinct values: CySEC, FCA, FSA Seychelles, ASIC & GAML, FSRA, FinCEN+FINRA, BVI, ASIC, FinCEN, eToroUS, None, NFA. Resolved via JOIN Dim_Regulation dr1 ON fsc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID; SELECT dr1.Name. (Tier 1 -Dictionary.Regulation)

current_comment: Same as Name: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Country upstream wiki). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country, rename chain: Name -> Country)
best_sibling_cell: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.Country.Name via DWH_dbo.Dim_Country JOIN on CountryID. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Country)

current_comment: Marketing region label for this country. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.MarketingRegion.Name via JOIN on MarketingRegionID. NOT the geographic region from Dictionary.Region. 22 distinct values (e.g., "ROW", "Africa", "French", "Arabic Other"). Used for marketing campaign grouping. (Tier 2 - SP_Dictionaries_Country_DL_To_Synapse)
best_sibling_cell: Marketing region label for this country. Loaded from etoro.Dictionary.MarketingRegion.Name via JOIN on MarketingRegionID. NOT the geographic region from Dictionary.Region. 22 distinct values (e.g., "ROW", "Africa", "French", "Arabic Other"). Used for marketing campaign grouping. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_Country.Region via Dim_Customer.CountryID. (Tier 2 -SP_Dictionaries_Country_DL_To_Synapse)

current_comment: Same as Name: Human-readable classification label. Used in compliance dashboards and regulatory reports. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.MifidCategorization). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_mifidcategorization, rename chain: Name -> Mifid)
best_sibling_cell: MiFID II client categorization (Retail/Professional/Eligible Counterparty). DEFAULT 0. Source: Ext_FSC_BackOffice_Customer.MifidCategorizationID (BO). FK to Dim_MifidCategorization. Renamed from Fact_SnapshotCustomer.MifidCategorizationID. (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

current_comment: Copy-trade relationship, where 0=manually opened and >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader.
best_sibling_cell: CASE WHEN MirrorID > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END from revenue TVFs, then ISNULL(...,-1); crypto-to-fiat branch forces -1 post UPDATE. Indicates copy-trading linkage on applicable metrics. (Tier 2 — Fact_CustomerAction.MirrorID logic via Function_Revenue_*)

current_comment: Legacy real-ownership flag, where 1=Real (owns shares) and 0=CFD.
best_sibling_cell: Indicates whether the redeemed position is a CFD position. Values: 'Y' (PositionID found in DWH_dbo.Dim_Position with IsSettled=0 and CloseDateID >= 10 days before @date), 'No' otherwise. Added 2020-10-14 for CFD project. (Tier 2 — SP_EXW_RedeemReconciliation)

current_comment: Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
best_sibling_cell: Leverage multiplier. For regular positions: from Dim_Position.Leverage (1, 5, 10, 20, 30, 50, 100, 200, 400). For copy positions: hardcoded 0 (copy relationships have no instrument leverage). Determines margin and settlement type. Distribution: 1x=44.8%, 20x=23.5%, 10x=10.4%, 5x=10.3%, 30x=4.5%, 2x=3.3%, others <2%. (Tier 1 — Dim_Position wiki, Trade.PositionTbl)

current_comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) for all trades at open time.
best_sibling_cell: USD trading volume for positions opened — SUM(ISNULL(VolumeOnOpen,0)) from parent. From Function_Trading_Volume. Unique to MonthlyData among all DailyCommisionReport satellites. (Tier 2 — SP_DailyCommisionReport)

current_comment: Close volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) at close. Same formula as Volume but at close-time values. Pro-rated for partial close.
best_sibling_cell: USD trading volume for positions closed — SUM(ISNULL(VolumeOnClose,0)) from parent. From Function_Trading_Volume. Unique to MonthlyData among all DailyCommisionReport satellites. (Tier 2 — SP_DailyCommisionReport)

current_comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) for Buy/Long (profits if price rises) trades.
best_sibling_cell: Total USD-equivalent buy-side volume in this minute. For opens: SUM(Dim_Position.Volume WHERE IsBuy=1). For closes: SUM(Dim_Position.VolumeOnClose WHERE IsBuy=0) (direction flipped). 0 when no activity. (Tier 2 — SP_Boundary_Cost)

Total USD-equivalent sell-side volume in this minute. For opens: SUM(Dim_Position.Volume WHERE IsBuy=0). For closes: SUM(Dim_Position.VolumeOnClose WHERE IsBuy=1) (direction flipped). 0 when no activity. (Tier 2 — SP_Boundary_Cost)

current_comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) for all trades.
best_sibling_cell: Row-level ISNULL(VolumeOpen,0)+ISNULL(VolumeClose,0) in CTE; output SUM(CAST(TotalVolume AS BIGINT)) by group

current_comment: Net open position in USD from units × pair rate × direction × conversion (see #Pre_UnrealizedPnL). (Tier 2 -- SP_PositionPnL, computed)
best_sibling_cell: Net Open Position — total directional exposure for this instrument on this hedge server. SUM of individual BI_DB_PositionPnL.NOP for valid customers (IsValidCustomer=1). Positive = net long, negative = net short. Range: -65.1M to 1.67B. Units are instrument-specific (not USD). ISNULL(NOP, 0) when no positions exist. (Tier 2 — SP_DailyNOP_ByInstrument)

current_comment: Net open position in USD for long/buy positions.
best_sibling_cell: NOP for long positions (IsBuy=1). (Tier 2 — SP_DealingDashboard_Clients)

current_comment: Net open position in USD for Sell/Short (profits if price falls) trades.
best_sibling_cell: ABS(NOP) for short positions (IsBuy=0). (Tier 2 — SP_DealingDashboard_Clients)

current_comment: Position size in units of the underlying instrument for open trades.
best_sibling_cell: Baseline net-open-position units prior to shocks; zero NULLs in live table (SUM(CASE WHEN UnitsNOP IS NULL THEN 1 END)=0). (Tier 2 — Dealing_dbo.Dealing_RiskMatrix_V2)

current_comment: Position size in units of the underlying instrument for Buy/Long (profits if price rises) trades.
best_sibling_cell: Total units bought (long positions opened + short positions closed) in this minute bucket for the instrument/HS/IsSettled combination. Aggregated from Dim_Position.AmountInUnitsDecimal. 0 when no buy-side activity in this minute. Note: closing a short counts as a buy in this context. (Tier 2 — SP_Boundary_Cost)

current_comment: Position size in units of the underlying instrument for Sell/Short (profits if price falls) trades.
best_sibling_cell: Total units sold (short positions opened + long positions closed) in this minute bucket for the instrument/HS/IsSettled combination. Aggregated from Dim_Position.AmountInUnitsDecimal. 0 when no sell-side activity in this minute. Note: closing a long counts as a sell. (Tier 2 — SP_Boundary_Cost)

current_comment: Count of positions, considering IsPartialCloseChild flag.
best_sibling_cell: Count of distinct positions (excludes partial close children). (Tier 2 — SP_DealingDashboard_Clients)

current_comment: Count of positions with OpenDateID and considering IsPartialCloseChild flag.
best_sibling_cell: Total count of positions opened on this date for this InstrumentType and Region. SUM aggregation from Dealing_DealingDashboard_Clients.NumberOfPositionsOpened, which excludes partial close children (IsPartialCloseChild=1). (Tier 2 — Dealing_DealingDashboard_Clients)

current_comment: Count of positions with CloseDateID > 0.
best_sibling_cell: Positions closed today. (Tier 2 — SP_DealingDashboard_Clients)
Facebook ad clicks count. SUM(clicks) from FB_Performance. 0 for DB-only rows or post-2026-01-07. (Tier 2 — SP_FB_Report)

current_comment: Same as DailyPnL: Day-over-day change: PositionPnL - prior day PositionPnL (NULL until post-switch UPDATE). (Tier 3 -- SP_PositionPnL, UPDATE vs prior DateID). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_positionpnl, rename chain: DailyPnL -> RealizedZero)
best_sibling_cell: Realized P&L from positions closed during the month. SUM(NetProfit + FullCommissionOnClose). (Tier 2 — SP_M_Crypto_RECON, Dim_Position.NetProfit + FullCommissionOnClose)

current_comment: Same as DailyPnL: Day-over-day change: PositionPnL - prior day PositionPnL (NULL until post-switch UPDATE). (Tier 3 -- SP_PositionPnL, UPDATE vs prior DateID). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_positionpnl, rename chain: DailyPnL -> ChangeInUnrealizedZero)
best_sibling_cell: SUM of CalculatedZero for positions still open on the report date (Indicator='UnRealized'). Represents daily change in unrealized zero. (Tier 2 — SP_DailyZero_TreeSize_NEW_InvalidCustomers)

current_comment: Same as DailyPnL: Day-over-day change: PositionPnL - prior day PositionPnL (NULL until post-switch UPDATE). (Tier 3 -- SP_PositionPnL, UPDATE vs prior DateID). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_positionpnl, rename chain: DailyPnL -> TotalZero)
best_sibling_cell: Total Zero PnL for the day: SUM(CalculatedZero) across all indicators = RealizedZero + ChangeInUnrealizedZero. (Tier 2 — SP_DailyZeroPnL_Stocks)

Commission amount. Opens: SUM(FullCommissionOnOpenInit) — accumulated FullCommissionByUnits including partial close children. Closes: SUM(FullCommissionOnClose) for same-day opens, SUM(FullCommissionOnClose - FullCommissionByUnits) for older positions. (Tier 2 — SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

current_comment: Full spread at close = market spread + eToro markup. May be adjusted for reopened positions.
best_sibling_cell: CASE WHEN ActionTypeID IN (4,5,6,28,40) THEN FullCommissionOnClose ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN ActionTypeID IN (1,2,3,39) THEN FullCommission ELSE 0 END

current_comment: Computed spread using forex price snapshots at open and close.
best_sibling_cell: Total spread-based (variable) commission for the instrument on the report date. Passthrough from BI_DB_VarCommission.VarCommission, matched by DateID, InstrumentID, IsSettled, and HedgeServerID. NULL when no matching VarCommission row exists (~29% of 2026 rows). (Tier 2 -SP_HedgeCost, BI_DB_VarCommission.VarCommission)

current_comment: Same as Amount: Position size in currency. Must be >= 0. Stored in dollars (PositionOpen divides by 100 from cents). (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_fact_customeraction, rename chain: Amount -> OverNightFee)
best_sibling_cell: Aggregated SUM from #RegAgg over matching CID rows; meaning per BI_DB_Client_Balance_CID_Level_New.OvernightFee. (Tier 2 -SP_Client_Balance_New, BI_DB_Client_Balance_CID_Level_New.OvernightFee)

current_comment: Fee subclass for nightly/weekend fee (ActionTypeID=35) for long/buy positions.
best_sibling_cell: Overnight fee for long positions only. (Tier 2 — SP_DealingDashboard_Clients)

reason: medium; no clear win uc r=1
current_comment: Fee subclass for ActionTypeID=35 (nightly/weekend fee) when trade direction is Sell/Short (profits if price falls).
best_sibling_cell: Overnight fee for short positions only. (Tier 2 — SP_DealingDashboard_Clients)

current_comment: Same as Amount: Position size in currency. Must be >= 0. Stored in dollars (PositionOpen divides by 100 from cents). (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_fact_customeraction, rename chain: Amount -> Dividend)
best_sibling_cell: Amount WHERE ActionTypeID IN (35) AND IsFeeDividend = 2

current_comment: Same as Amount: Position size in currency. Must be >= 0. Stored in dollars (PositionOpen divides by 100 from cents). (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl). (Propagated from main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_fact_customeraction, rename chain: Amount -> TicketFees)
best_sibling_cell: Per-trade ticket fee on @date. SUM(Amount) WHERE ActionTypeID=35 AND IsFeeDividend=4. Subset of TradingFees — excludes Islamic fees component. (Tier 2 — SP_DDR_Auxiliary_Metrics #TicketFees_prep)

current_comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)
best_sibling_cell: Asset class or copy-trade category. For regular positions: Dim_Instrument.InstrumentType text label (8 InstrumentTypeID-driven values: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies). For copy positions: 'Copy Trade' (MirrorTypeID≠4) or 'Copy Portfolio' (MirrorTypeID=4). Distribution: Stocks 36.8%, Indices 18.8%, Commodities 17.1%, Crypto Currencies 16.2%, Currencies 6.1%, ETF 4.0%, Copy Trade 0.8%, Copy Portfolio 0.2%. (Tier 2 — SP_PositionHoldingTime + Dim_Instru

Event datetime. For KPI='FTDs': FTD timestamp (Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate — the deposit approval datetime). For KPI='Registration': registration datetime (Customer.CustomerStatic.Registered). Historical rows carry the original event timestamp from BI_DB_LiveAcquisitionDashboard_Daily. (Tier 2 — etoro.Customer.Customer.Registered / etoro.Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate)

current_comment: Regulatory entity/jurisdiction (e.g., CySEC, FCA, ASIC, SEC). Determines which eToro legal entity the customer belongs to.
best_sibling_cell: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. 12 distinct values: CySEC, FCA, FSA Seychelles, ASIC & GAML, FSRA, FinCEN+FINRA, BVI, ASIC, FinCEN, eToroUS, None, NFA. Resolved via JOIN Dim_Regulation dr1 ON fsc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID; SELECT dr1.Name. (Tier 1 -Dictionary.Regulation)

LP routing method: HBC (Hedge By Client — client-side hedging) or CBH (Covered By Hedge — eToro hedges on LP side). Derived from CopyFromLake.eToroLogs_Real_Hedge_EMSOrders.HedgeExecutionModeID: 1=HBC, else=CBH. NULL when EMS record not found for a position. (Tier 2 — SP_Latency_Report)

current_comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.
best_sibling_cell: Position identifier. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position. HASH distribution key. DWH note: for ActionTypeID=36 + CompensationReasonID IN (117,118), extracted from Description field via reverse string parsing with TRY_CAST fallback. COALESCE prefers Dim_Position. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl) (via BI_DB_Fact_Customer_Action_Position_Distribution)

current_comment: Instrument identifier. Foreign key to Dim_Instrument.
best_sibling_cell: Composite instrument identifier. CASE WHEN eToroInstrumentID >= 100000 THEN eToroInstrumentID ELSE CryptoId END. For eToro-mapped instruments, equals eToroInstrumentID; for crypto-native instruments, equals CryptoID. Not a direct FK to EXW_Currency.Instruments. (Tier 2 — EXW_Wallet.CryptoTypes / EXW_Wallet.CryptoMarketRatesMappings)

User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. Passthrough from DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument.InstrumentDisplayName. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

1 Long 0 Short; NULL ⇒ non-trade row sentinel — widened/truncated via ISNULL(...,-1) with dividend amount-based overrides (Metric='Dividends') and CryptoToFiatFee sentinel -1 path. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)

current_comment: How many units of an instrument are in the position.
best_sibling_cell: Trade size in instrument units, split-adjusted. Dim_Position.AmountInUnitsDecimal * COALESCE(SplitRatio.AmountRatio, 1). (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position, split-adjusted)
Position open or close forex rate, split-adjusted. InitForexRate * COALESCE(SplitRatio.PriceRatio, 1). (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position, split-adjusted)

When the transaction record was created in the database. From SentTransactions.Occurred or ReceivedTransactions.Occurred. DWH note: Stored as datetime (datetime2 in source view). (Tier 1 — Wallet.TransactionsView)
Trade action type: ManualClose, StopLoss, TakeProfit, Manual Open, Order, OpenOpen. Derived from ClosePositionReasonID and OrderType in SP logic. (Tier 2 — SP_Latency_Report)

ETL-computed USD conversion rate for this position direction. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 → 1.0; if BuyCurrencyID=1 → 1/Bid(IsBuy=1) or 1/Ask(IsBuy=0); if cross-rate via bridge instrument with Conversion_SellCurrencyID=1 → Conversion_Bid or Conversion_Ask; else → 1/Conversion_Bid-or-Ask. NULL where no price could be resolved. Multiply Bid × ConversionRate to get USD value per unit. (Tier 2 — SP_CashRiskMatrix)
eToro-side timestamp for this execution event. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)

Integer identifier of the liquidity provider account used for hedging. References External_etoro_Hedge_HedgeServerToLiquidityAccount.LiquidityAccountID. NULL for 25% of rows (positions without assigned LP). 44 distinct accounts observed. (Tier 3 — External_etoro_Hedge_HedgeServerToLiquidityAccount DDL + live data)
Price the client requested at order submission. Basis for slippage calculation. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)
Average close spread for positions closed during this hour. AVG(EndForex_Ask - EndForex_Bid) from Dim_Position. Default 0 when no closes. (Tier 2 — SP_Dealing_DSC_HedgeOnIndices)

Timestamp of the most recent LP quote from Kusto (CopyFromLake.PricesFromProvider_MarketCurrencyPrice) at or before ExecutionTime. Fetched via CROSS APPLY TOP 1 ORDER BY OccurredAtServer DESC. Used to compare LP's own market data with their execution price. (Tier 2 — SP_Execution_Slippage)
Reference rate from Kusto at execution time. Used as fair-value benchmark. (Tier 2 — Kusto/CopyFromLake reference)

Sum of USD slippage across all trades in the (Date, InstrumentType, HedgingMode) bucket. Formula: SUM((IsBuy=1?1:-1)×(eToro_Price−ExecutionRate)×Units×FX_Rate). Positive = eToro gains; negative = eToro cost. (Tier 2 — SP_Execution_Slippage)

current_comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).
best_sibling_cell: Timestamp when this crypto asset was first added to the wallet (maps to WalletDB.Wallet.WalletAssets.Occurred). Despite the name, this is a wallet creation/association timestamp — not the ETL run time. CAST from datetime2(7) to datetime. (Tier 2 — SP_EXW_InternalWallet; renamed from Occurred)

current_comment: The exact date and time when the customer clicked to request opening a position.
best_sibling_cell: Timestamp when the client's request arrived at the eToro server. RequestOpenOccurred for opens, RequestCloseOccurred for closes. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)
The datetime at which the LP confirmed execution of the hedge order, per Dealing_staging.Etoro_Hedge_ExecutionLog. This is the actual fill timestamp. (Tier 2 — SP_Execution_Slippage)
Timestamp of the request as recorded by the EMS (LP side). Used for TradingToExecutionLatency. (Tier 2 — CopyFromLake.eToroLogs_Real_Hedge_EMSOrders)
EMS execution identifier. Links to CopyFromLake.eToroLogs_Real_Hedge_EMSOrders.ExecutionID. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)

current_comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.
best_sibling_cell: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. COALESCE(POB.RealCID, TIN.RealCID). From Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)

Settlement type classification: 'Real' = settled stock ownership position (IsSettled=1 or HedgeServerID IN (9,102,112,125,126) for LP side), 'CFD' = contract-for-difference. Client-side uses Dim_PositionChangeLog correction (ChangeTypeID=13) to recover the IsSettled value AS OF the report date before any subsequent changes. (Tier 2 -SP_HedgeCost)
P&L calculation version identifier. Indicates which pricing methodology was applied. (Tier 2 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position)
FK to Trade.Orders. Originating order. NULL for corporate action/dividend positions. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)
Milliseconds from RequestOccurred to Occurred — time for the eToro database to record the trade. (Tier 2 — computed)
Milliseconds from RequestOccurred to ExecutionTime — total client-to-LP execution time. The primary latency KPI. Floored at 0. (Tier 2 — computed: DATEDIFF(ms, RequestCloseOccurred, ExecutionTime))
Milliseconds from RequestTimeFromEMS (EMS request timestamp) to ExecutionTime — time within the LP matching engine. Floored at 0. (Tier 2 — computed: DATEDIFF(ms, RequestTime, ExecutionTime))
Market open timestamp on this trade date for the instrument's exchange. (Tier 2 — SP logic / market calendar)

Flag: 1 if the position's RequestOccurred (close) or RequestOpenOccurred (open) falls within the first 5 minutes of the exchange session (from OpenTimeUTC in CalendarDB schedule). Used to isolate open-session latency spikes. Added SR-273548 Sep 2024. (Tier 2 — SP_Latency_Report)
1 if trade occurred within 7 minutes of market open. Compensation modifier. (Tier 2 — computed)

Event datetime. For KPI='FTDs': FTD timestamp (Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate — the deposit approval datetime). For KPI='Registration': registration datetime (Customer.CustomerStatic.Registered). Historical rows carry the original event timestamp from BI_DB_LiveAcquisitionDashboard_Daily. (Tier 2 — etoro.Customer.Customer.Registered / etoro.Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate)

The CopyTrader parent customer ID from etoroGeneral_History_GuruCopiers. Clustered index column. Only non-PI parents (GuruStatusID IN (0,1) or NULL) with AUM > $15,000 and active copiers. (Tier 2 -SP_NonPI_HighAUM, etoroGeneral_History_GuruCopiers.ParentCID)
Leader username at mirror creation. Denormalized for display; Trade.RegisterMirror passes from caller. (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Mirror via Trade.Mirror)

current_comment: Passthrough from Fact_SnapshotCustomer.WeekendFeePrecentage in masked UC export (same semantics as base table wiki). Weekend overnight fee percentage applied to this customer. Note: column name typo ("Precentage"). Source: Ext_FSC_Real_Customer_Customer.WeekendFeePrecentage (CC). (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

Customer's settled (realized) equity — the realized portion of customer balance. Excludes unrealized PnL on open positions (the unrealized component is Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL.PositionPnL). Computed as History.ActiveCredit.RealizedEquity if non-zero, otherwise TotalCash + TotalPositionsAmount + InProcessCashouts (cash + invested principal in open positions + pending cashouts). Together with PositionPnL it sums to the customer's full Balance per V_Liabilities: Balance = RealizedEquity + Po...

Sum of all open position amounts (NewAmount) for this CID on this date. Includes all asset classes: CFD, stocks, crypto, futures, margin. Source: open positions (Trade.OpenPositionEndOfDay) + same-day closed positions (History.ClosePositionEndOfDay) minus History.Credit CreditTypeID=13 adjustments. (Tier 2 — SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity_TotalPositionAmount) (via Fact_SnapshotEquity). Source: Fact_SnapshotEquity.TotalPositionsAmount. (T2 — V_Liabilities)

Outstanding credit/bonus balance from History.ActiveCredit. Last credit event per CID per day (selected via ROW_NUMBER partition by CID, ordered by Occurred DESC, CreditID DESC). Negative values represent outstanding obligations. (Tier 2 — SP_Fact_SnapshotEquity) (via Fact_SnapshotEquity). Source: Fact_SnapshotEquity.Credit. (T2 — V_Liabilities)
Answer text for Q10. (Tier 2 - SP/DDL code; CODE-BACKED)
Answer text for Q11. (Tier 2 - SP/DDL code; CODE-BACKED)

best_sibling_cell: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. COALESCE(POB.RealCID, TIN.RealCID). From Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)

current_comment: Passthrough from Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID in masked UC export (same semantics as base table wiki). Customer's assigned regulatory jurisdiction. DEFAULT 0. Sourced from Ext_FSC_BackOffice_RegulationChangeLog.ToRegulationID - end-of-day change. See section 2.4. FK to Dim_Regulation. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
best_sibling_cell: Customer's regulatory regime as of the snapshot date, resolved from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Regulation.ID (0=None, 1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 4=ASIC, 9=FSA Seychelles, etc.). (Tier 2 — SP_PositionPnL_Agg_daily_Staking, DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID)

ETL-computed USD conversion rate for this position direction. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 → 1.0; if BuyCurrencyID=1 → 1/Bid(IsBuy=1) or 1/Ask(IsBuy=0); if cross-rate via bridge instrument with Conversion_SellCurrencyID=1 → Conversion_Bid or Conversion_Ask; else → 1/Conversion_Bid-or-Ask. FK to Trade.Mirror. 0/NULL = manual. Positive = copy-trade position. (All rows in this table have MirrorID > 0, MirrorTypeID = 4.) (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position via Trade.PositionTbl)

FK to EXW_Dictionary.TransactionStatus. 0=Pending, 1=Confirmed, 2=Verified, 3=Error, 4=Timeout, 5=PermanentError, 6=WavedError. Typical lifecycle: Pending → Confirmed → Verified. Recent distribution (2026): Pending 47%, Verified 47%, Confirmed 6%, Error/Timeout/WavedError/PermanentError <1%. (Tier 3 — WalletDB.Wallet.ReceivedTransactionStatuses)

1 Long 0 Short; NULL ⇒ non-trade row sentinel — widened/truncated via ISNULL(...,-1) with dividend amount-based overrides (Metric='Dividends') and CryptoToFiatFee sentinel -1 path. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)

Settlement type classification: 'Real' = settled stock ownership position (IsSettled=1 or HedgeServerID IN (9,102,112,125,126) for LP side), 'CFD' = contract-for-difference. Client-side uses Dim_PositionChangeLog correction (ChangeTypeID=13) to recover the IsSettled value AS OF the report date before any subsequent changes. (Tier 2 -SP_HedgeCost)

current_comment: Position leverage multiplier (e.g., 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 30). 1 = no leverage (real stock).
best_sibling_cell: Leverage multiplier. For regular positions: from Dim_Position.Leverage (1, 5, 10, 20, 30, 50, 100, 200, 400). For copy positions: hardcoded 0 (copy relationships have no instrument leverage). Determines margin and settlement type. Distribution: 1x=44.8%, 20x=23.5%, 10x=10.4%, 5x=10.3%, 30x=4.5%, 2x=3.3%, others <2%. (Tier 1 — Dim_Position wiki, Trade.PositionTbl)

When the transaction record was created in the database. From SentTransactions.Occurred or ReceivedTransactions.Occurred. DWH note: Stored as datetime (datetime2 in source view). (Tier 1 — Wallet.TransactionsView)
When position was opened (mapped from Occurred in production for Dim_Position; from Trade.Mirror.Occurred for Dim_Mirror). Includes milliseconds. (Tier 1 — Dim_Position wiki, Trade.PositionTbl)
Instrument units traded. For opens: SUM(InitialUnits) WHERE OpenDateID=@DateID. For closes: SUM(AmountInUnitsDecimal) WHERE CloseDateID=@DateID. (Tier 2 — SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

DDR branch: SUM(ga.Amount) grouped after WHERE ga.DateID BETWEEN @sdateInt AND @edateInt AND ga.Metric <> 'StakingLagOneMonth' (staking lag rows excluded from this union part). Staking branch: SUM(frsf.TotalUSDDistributed) from Function_Revenue_StakingFee(@sdateInt,@edateInt) with @OnlyValidCustomers filter on frsf.IsValidCustomer
Margin per unit. From Trade.ProviderToInstrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)
SUM(frfc.NetProfit) over the group. Base measure: Realized PnL. 0 when open; set on close. In position currency. (Tier 2 — Trade.PositionTbl)

Total commission (USD) for this dimension group and month. SUM of two formulas: ActionTypeID IN(4,5,6)→SUM(FullCommissionOnClose-FullCommissionByUnits); ActionTypeID IN(1,2,3)→SUM(FullCommissionByUnits). Negative values are valid (reversals). Range: -790,193 to 27,531,856. (Tier 2 — SP_M_UK_CommissionReport_byLeverage)
Spread-related commission component. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)

current_comment: The commision of opening the position. The sum of the eToro s commision to the customer and the provider s commision to eToro. (AskSpreaded - BidSpreaded) * units * ConversionRate.
best_sibling_cell: Commission amount. Opens: SUM(FullCommissionOnOpenInit) — accumulated FullCommissionByUnits including partial close children. Closes: SUM(FullCommissionOnClose) for same-day opens, SUM(FullCommissionOnClose - FullCommissionByUnits) for older positions. (Tier 2 — SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

current_comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.

Gaps exist in sequence (e.g., 5, 7 missing) - likely reserved IDs for blockchains that were planned but not launched. (Tier 1 — Wallet.BlockchainCryptos)
